falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would confirm a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern match percentage drops below 60% for bottom_2024_aug
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant divergence from the historical bottom pattern would invalidate the 85% similarity assumption, proving the current UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above 120% of the previous cycle's peak within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout to this extreme bullish level would falsify the HOLD signal by confirming a definitive trend reversal against the current UNKNOWN phase.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
